products.title: Silicone Teether Cum Rattle Kitty
products.body_html:
Silicone Rattle Cum Teether (Random Colours)

Soothe, play, and smile — all in one adorable essential. Our Silicone Rattle Cum Teether is thoughtfully designed to comfort your baby during teething while keeping them engaged with gentle rattle sounds. Made from soft, food-grade silicone, it is safe for little mouths and perfect for tiny hands to hold and explore.

The flexible silicone surface helps massage sore gums, providing instant relief during teething discomfort. Its lightweight, easy-grip design encourages sensory development and improves hand-eye coordination. The built-in rattle sound adds playful stimulation, making it both a soothing and entertaining companion for your baby.

Available in random attractive colours, each piece is unique and delightful. Colour selection will be shipped based on availability, adding a sweet surprise to your order.

Why Parents Choose This Silicone Rattle Cum Teether

  • Dual-purpose design: teether + rattle

  • Made from safe, baby-friendly silicone

  • Soft on gums and gentle on developing teeth

  • Lightweight and easy to hold

  • Helps improve sensory and motor skills

Key Features

Material: 100% Food-Grade Silicone
Design: Soft-textured teething surface with built-in rattle
Grip: Easy-hold structure for tiny hands
Safety: BPA-free, non-toxic, baby-safe
Colour: Random colours will be sent based on stock availability

A must-have everyday essential for teething comfort and playful learning.

products.title: Muslin Blankets 8 Layer | Stars
products.body_html:
Kiids Kingdom Muslin Blankets give your little one the softest start. This 8 layer muslin wrap feels gentle, airy and really kind to newborn skin. Many moms love how soft and light it feels. Honestly, once you try it you will not want anything else.

Our muslin blankets keep your little one warm without feeling too heavy. They breathe really well so baby does not overheat. Furthermore, every wash makes them even softer than before. Plus, the cute flamingo print makes it look really sweet too.

Key Features:

Premium Muslin Fabric: Our Muslin Blankets use 100% pure muslin cotton. In particular, this muslin wrap feels ultra soft and gentle on sensitive newborn skin. As a result, it causes no irritation, no redness and no discomfort at all.

8 Layer Protection: This baby muslin blanket packs eight full layers of soft muslin. Additionally, the layers give just the right warmth without overheating baby. Therefore, it works really well across all seasons.

Breathable and Hypoallergenic: Our Muslin Blankets allow proper airflow against baby's skin. Moreover, the natural muslin fibres fight allergens and suit sensitive skin well. Therefore, it makes a great pick for newborns with delicate skin.

Generous Size: This muslin wrap measures 100x100cm giving you plenty of space. Moreover, you can use it as a swaddle, stroller cover, play mat or nursing cover. Therefore, it does so many jobs at once making it great value for money.

Easy Care: You can machine wash your muslin blanket with ease. In addition, every wash makes it softer and better than before. As a result, it stays fresh, clean and lovely for a long time.

Product Details:

  • Size: 100x100cm ± 2cm
  • Brand: Kiids Kingdom

products.title: Baby Nest | Deer
products.body_html:
Some moments with your newborn just need to feel really natural. 🤍 That is exactly what our baby nest gives you. Pure, breathable and completely safe for newborns from day one. Our baby nest uses polyfiber filling with Cotton Cover have no harsh chemicals anywhere. Furthermore, the snug design keeps baby in a natural resting position without any rolling risk.

Kiids Kingdom is one of the best baby nest brands in India with thousands of happy parents. Our cotton carry nest is loved for its natural feel, firm support and easy care. Moreover, parents who prefer natural materials keep coming back because it delivers on every level. Therefore, if you are looking for the best natural baby nest in India this is a great place to start.

This baby carry nest uses lightweight fiber filling that feels really plush and cushioned under baby👶.  It is softer than cotton filling and gives a more cloud like feel for your little one. Furthermore, the fiber filling is lightweight so baby stays warm without feeling weighed down at all. Plus, the cute print makes it look really sweet in any room of your home.

Why Parents Choose Our Fiber Baby Nest: 

  • 🌸 Extra soft and plush fiber filling inside
  • 💤 Cloud like cushioned feel for newborns
  • 🏠 Lightweight and warm for all seasons
  • ♻️ Machine washable and shape retaining
  • 📦 Easy to carry and fold anywhere
  • 👶 Completely safe for newborns from day one
  • 🌿 One of the top rated baby nest brands in India
  • 📐 Dimensions 80x42cm perfect for newborns

The Softest Baby Nest Your Little One Will Love: 💤

Every parent wants their newborn to feel as comfortable as possible. In particular, some babies just settle better on a softer more cushioned surface. Moreover, our fiber filled baby nest bed gives that extra plush feel that helps the fussiest babies relax really quickly. Therefore, it is a popular first choice among parents who want maximum softness and trusted quality for their little one.

The fiber filling in this newborn carry bed is lightweight and really easy to compress for travel. Additionally, the soft cushioned surface moulds gently around baby giving them a snug and secure feeling. Furthermore, the breathable cotton exterior still allows proper airflow keeping baby comfortable in all weather. Therefore, this fiber baby carry nest strikes the perfect balance between softness, warmth and safety for newborns.

Key Features of Our Fiber Baby Nest: 

Lightweight Fiber Filling: This baby nest uses soft lightweight fiber filling throughout the inside. In particular, the fiber filling gives a plush cushioned feel that is softer than cotton options. As a result, baby sinks into a really comfortable and safe resting surface from day one.

Soft Cotton Exterior: Our baby carry nest uses soft breathable cotton on the outside throughout. Additionally, this outer fabric feels really gentle on the most sensitive newborn skin. Therefore, no redness, no irritation and no discomfort during rest or sleep time at all.

Soft and Cushioned Feel: This baby nest bed gives a softer more plush feel than cotton filled options. Moreover, the fiber filling moulds gently around baby giving a snug and secure feeling. Therefore, it is a great pick for babies who settle better on a softer more cushioned surface.

Portable and Lightweight: This fiber newborn carry bed is really lightweight and easy to fold for travel. Moreover, the sturdy handles make it simple to carry from room to room or on outings. Therefore, your baby always has their favourite soft space wherever you take them.

How to Use Your Fiber Baby Nest: 

Place your fiber baby nest on a flat stable surface like a bed, sofa or floor mat. Furthermore, always make sure the surface is firm and level before placing baby inside. Moreover, keep baby within your sight at all times during use. Therefore, with proper supervision this fiber newborn carry bed gives your baby the softest and safest space to rest.

Product Details:

  • Filling: Lightweight PolyFiber
  • Dimensions: 72x44cm approximately
  • Brand: Kiids Kingdom

Bliss Organic Period Panties are designed for maximum comfort, protection, and sustainability. Made from natural, plant-based materials, they are free of chemicals, plastic, and rashes, making them perfect for maternity, heavy flow, and incontinence care.

    • Biodegradable & Safe: Certified by the Bureau of Standards, FDA approved, and ASTM Standards certified, ensuring the highest quality and eco-friendliness.

    • Hygienic & Disposable: Single-use design for easy disposal, eliminating the need for washing and ensuring maximum hygiene.

Every feeding moment deserves something soft and reliable nearby. 🤍 Kiids Kingdom Muslin Burp Cloths are soft, absorbent and really gentle on your baby's sensitive skin. Honestly, they are one of those baby essentials every new parent is glad they stocked up on early.

Our cloths are crafted from premium crinkled muslin cotton that feels really nice against baby skin. 👶 They soak up spills and messes really well without feeling rough or scratchy. Furthermore, they get softer and better with every single wash. Therefore, you will find yourself reaching for them at every single feed.

Kiids Kingdom is one of the best muslin burp cloth brands in India trusted by parents across the country. Our cloths are loved for their softness, absorbency and really easy care.

Moreover, they are completely free from harmful chemicals making them safe for sensitive newborn skin. Therefore, if you are looking for the best muslin burp cloths for newborns in India this is a great place to start.

What Makes Our Cloths Special: 

  • 🌿 100% premium crinkled muslin cotton throughout
  • 💧 Highly absorbent multi layer design
  • 🏠 Large enough for full shoulder coverage
  • ♻️ Machine washable and gets softer with every wash
  • 👶 Hypoallergenic and free from harmful chemicals
  • 🌸 Safe for sensitive and newborn skin
  • 📦 Perfect for feeding and daily use
  • 🛒 One of the most trusted burp cloth brands in India

Why Our Muslin Burp Cloths Stand Out: 

Most regular burp cloths feel stiff and rough after a few washes. In particular, our crinkled cloths stay soft and gentle wash after wash. Moreover, the crinkled texture adds extra absorbency that flat cloths simply cannot match. Therefore, they are a smarter and gentler choice for your baby every single day.

Are Muslin Burp Cloths Worth It?

Are muslin burp cloths better than cotton ones for babies? Absolutely yes. Muslin cotton is softer, more breathable and more absorbent than regular cotton. Furthermore, the open weave allows better airflow keeping baby comfortable during and after feeds. Therefore, they are the preferred choice among parents who want the best for their newborns.

Are muslin burp cloths necessary for babies? Every parent who has been through feeding time knows the answer. 😄 Furthermore, having soft absorbent cloths ready at every feed saves clothes, saves time and keeps baby comfortable. Therefore, good muslin burp cloths are not just necessary they are absolutely essential.

What You Get in Every Cloth: 

Premium Crinkled Cotton: Our muslin burp cloths use premium crinkled muslin cotton throughout. In particular, this fabric feels really soft and gentle on sensitive newborn skin. As a result, no redness, no irritation and no discomfort during or after feeding time.

Soaks Up Every Mess: Each cloth uses a multi layer design for excellent absorbency. Additionally, the crinkled texture soaks up spills and messes really effectively. Therefore, it keeps both you and baby clean and comfortable at every single feed.

Generous Size: Our cloths are large enough to give full coverage on your shoulder. Moreover, the generous size means no more worrying about spills missing the cloth. Therefore, it is a practical and really useful size for everyday feeding use.

Gentle and Chemical Free: Each cloth is completely free from harmful chemicals and dyes. Moreover, the natural muslin cotton is safe for even the most sensitive newborn skin. Therefore, parents with newborns trust these cloths for safe and gentle daily use.

Simple Washing and Care Guide: ♻️

Machine wash your muslin burp cloths without any worry at all. In addition, every wash makes them softer and more absorbent than before. As a result, they stay fresh, clean and gentle for many months of daily feeding use.

products.title: Silicone Teether Squirrel
products.body_html:
Silicone Teether with Textured Backside (Colour varies)

Soothe your baby’s teething discomfort with our Silicone Teether with Textured Backside, designed to gently relieve sore gums while encouraging healthy oral development. Made from premium, food-grade silicone, this teether is soft, flexible, and perfectly safe for newborns who love to chew and explore with their mouths.

The innovative textured backside adds extra comfort during the teething phase. The raised bumps and grooves massage baby’s gums, providing soothing relief while also stimulating sensory development. Its lightweight, easy-to-hold shape allows babies to grasp, chew, and play effortlessly—supporting hand–eye coordination and fine motor skills.

Durable, non-toxic, and freezer-safe, this silicone teether is a must-have for every diaper bag and daily routine. Whether used warm for comfort or chilled for extra relief, it offers a clean, hygienic, and baby-safe solution that parents trust. Perfect for everyday use and gifting.

Why Parents Choose This Silicone Teether

  • Made from 100% food-grade silicone

  • Textured backside offers extra gum relief

  • Soft, flexible, and chew-friendly

  • Freezer-safe for enhanced soothing

  • Easy-to-hold design for tiny hands

  • BPA-free, non-toxic, and hygienic

Key Features

  • Textured Back Surface: Raised bumps help massage sore gums and support sensory development.

  • Food-Grade Silicone: Safe, durable, and gentle for daily chewing.

  • Easy Grip: Designed for little hands to grasp and hold comfortably.

  • Freezer Safe: Can be chilled for added teething relief.

  • Hygienic & Washable: Easily washable and resistant to bacterial growth.

products.title: Neem Teether Cum Rattle Teddy
products.body_html:
Neem Teether Cum Rattle

Give your little one a naturally soothing start with our Neem Teether Cum Rattle, crafted from 100% pure neem wood. Known for its antibacterial and anti-fungal properties, neem makes an excellent natural material for teething babies. This teether helps soothe sore gums while the gentle rattle sound keeps your baby engaged, encouraging sensory development from an early age.

Designed with baby-safe smooth edges, this neem teether supports oral development and strengthens grip as babies learn to hold and shake. Unlike plastic teethers, neem wood is non-toxic, chemical-free, and safe for newborns who love to explore with their mouths. The natural texture also helps promote healthier teething habits as babies begin to chew and bite.

Lightweight, durable, and naturally aromatic, this dual-purpose teether and rattle is a must-have in every newborn’s essentials. Whether it's for everyday use or gifting, the Neem Teether Cum Rattle blends tradition, safety, and early learning beautifully—making it a parent-favourite choice.

Why Parents Choose This Neem Teether Cum Rattle

  • Made from 100% pure neem wood

  • Naturally antibacterial & chemical-free

  • Soothes teething pain effectively

  • Gentle rattle sound for sensory stimulation

  • Easy-to-hold shape for tiny hands

  • Safe, durable, and eco-friendly alternative to plastic

Key Features

  • Natural Material: Crafted from pure neem wood known for its antimicrobial properties.

  • Dual Purpose: Works as both a teether and a rattle to support sensory play.

  • Baby-Safe Design: Smooth edges and non-toxic finish for newborn safety.

  • Development Friendly: Enhances grip, coordination, and oral development.

  • Eco-Friendly: Sustainable, biodegradable, and free from harmful chemicals.

products.title: Newborn Traditional Combo Set
products.body_html:
Give your newborn the gentle start they deserve with our Newborn Traditional Protection Combo Set, inspired by age-old South Indian rituals. From soothing herbs to natural wooden essentials, this set brings together everything a baby needs for comfort, wellness, and early sensory development. Each item is carefully sourced, ensuring purity, safety, and authenticity for your baby’s delicate needs.

Inside this combo, you’ll find Vengai Pottu prepared in a coconut shell, Vasambu, Paalpasi, Karupu Valaiyal, Panchavarnam Thandu, and a handcrafted Neem Wood Teether cum Rattle. These natural elements have been trusted for generations to offer protection, calming effects, and early motor skill support. Perfect for daily use and newborn ceremonies, this set blends tradition with modern baby-safe standards.

Thoughtfully packed and beautifully presented, this combo also makes a meaningful gifting choice for baby showers, naming ceremonies, and welcome rituals. Whether you’re a new parent or gifting loved ones, this collection ensures a memorable and culturally rich newborn experience.

Why Parents Choose This Newborn Traditional Protection Combo Set

  • 100% natural, traditional, and newborn-safe

  • Includes both functional and cultural essentials

  • Perfect for gifting newborns and baby ceremonies

  • Encourages early sensory and motor skill development

  • Neem teether cum rattle is antibacterial and chemical-free

  • Trusted herbs like Vasambu and Paalpasi for soothing benefits

Key Features

  • Vengai Pottu (in Coconut Shell) (1) : Traditional protection prepared using natural methods.

  • Vasambu (1) : Known for calming and wellness properties for newborns.

  • Paalpasi (1) : Traditionally used for early baby rituals.

  • Karupu Valaiyal (2 set) : Symbol of protection and good health for newborns.

  • Panchavarnam Thandu (1 set) : Cultural essential representing positive energy.

  • Neem Wood Teether cum Rattle (1) : Antibacterial, safe, and crafted to support teething & sensory play.

products.title: Jumpsuit or Full Romper Giraffe
products.body_html:
Description

Elevate your little one’s wardrobe with the Kiids Kingdom Knitted Cotton Jumpsuit, designed for both comfort and style. Made from high-quality knitted cotton, this jumpsuit offers a soft, stretchy fit that’s perfect for playtime, lounging, or outings.

Key Features:

  • Soft Knitted Cotton Fabric: Crafted from 100% premium knitted cotton, this jumpsuit provides a gentle touch against your child’s sensitive skin, ensuring all-day comfort.
  • Stretchy & Flexible Fit: The stretchy fabric allows for easy movement, making it ideal for active toddlers who love to run, jump, and explore.
  • Stylish Design: With a trendy design and available in various colors, this jumpsuit can easily transition from casual daywear to a stylish outfit for family gatherings or outings.
  • Easy Dressing: Featuring snap closures or an easy pull-on style, changing your little one is quick and convenient, perfect for busy parents.
  • Durable & Long-Lasting: Designed to withstand everyday wear, this jumpsuit maintains its shape and softness even after multiple washes.
  • Breathable & Comfortable: The breathable nature of knitted cotton keeps your child comfortable, making it suitable for all seasons.
  • Brand: Kiids Kingdom
  • Size: 0-3 months
  • Print: Giraffe

Make every day a stylish adventure with the Kiids Kingdom Knitted Cotton Jumpsuit, a perfect blend of comfort, durability, and fashion for your little explorer!

products.title: Muslin Swaddle | Blue Leaf
products.body_html:
Wrap your little one in soft comfort with the Kiids Kingdom Muslin Swaddle, designed to create a snug and secure wrap for newborns and infants. Moreover, its breathable muslin fabric feels gentle on delicate baby skin, helping your little one stay calm and comfortable during naps or bedtime. As a result, this swaddle becomes a daily essential for parents seeking both softness and support.

This muslin swaddle is lightweight, airy and perfect for all seasons. Additionally, the generous size allows you to wrap your baby easily, giving them a soothing and snug fit that helps reduce startle reflex. Furthermore, the breathable weave keeps your newborn relaxed by allowing steady airflow throughout the day. In addition, its smooth texture makes it suitable for infants who need gentle fabric for swaddling or cuddling.

Since the cloth is durable and easy to care for, it stays soft after many washes. Therefore, parents often use this swaddle not only at home but also outdoors as a stroller cover or light blanket. Finally, its versatile design means you can also use it as a nursing cover or burp cloth when needed.

products.title: Baby Mitten and Booties | Pink
products.body_html:
Kiids Kingdom Baby Mitten and Booties are a simple must have for every newborn. Soft, warm and really gentle on delicate skin. This matching set keeps little hands and feet cozy all day long. Honestly, it is one of those newborn picks you will reach for every single day.

Our baby mitten and booties feel snug without squeezing or pinching at all. Baby stays warm and comfortable from morning to night. Furthermore, the soft cotton fabric feels really kind on fresh newborn skin. Plus, the sweet grey dot print makes this little set look really cute too.

Key Features of Our Baby Mitten and Booties:

Cotton Fabric: Our baby mitten and booties use soft breathable cotton throughout. In particular, this fabric suits the most sensitive newborn skin really well. As a result, baby stays fresh, comfy and rash free all through the day.

Snug Fit: This newborn mitten set sits firmly without slipping or coming loose. Additionally, the snug fit keeps little hands from scratching delicate newborn skin. Therefore, you get peace of mind knowing baby stays safe and warm all night long.

Essential Newborn Set: Our baby mitten and booties set covers everything little hands and feet need. Moreover, the neat matching look makes it a lovely gift for baby showers too. Looking for a complete newborn bundle? Check out our Newborn Essentials Combo for everything your baby needs in one go. Therefore, it is a set that new parents truly appreciate from day one.

Versatile Use: This newborn mitten and booties set works well indoors and outdoors. Moreover, it handles different temperatures without any fuss at all. Therefore, you will find yourself reaching for it again and again through the early weeks.

Easy Care for Your Baby Mitten and Booties:

Toss your set in the washing machine with ease. In addition, every wash keeps the soft cotton fabric feeling fresh and new. As a result, this newborn set stays lovely and gentle through many months of use.

  • Brand: Kiids Kingdom

products.title: Feeding Pillow Heart
products.body_html:
Description- Organic cotton filling

Make feeding time more comfortable and supportive with the Kiids Kingdom – Natural Kapok Silk Cotton Feeding Pillow for your newborn babies. Filled with soft and sustainable Kapok silk cotton, this pillow provides the perfect blend of comfort and support for nursing or bottle-feeding, enhancing bonding time for you and your baby.

Key Features:

  • Natural Kapok Silk Cotton Filling: Filled with eco-friendly Kapok silk cotton, known for its lightweight, soft, and breathable properties, giving gentle support without added weight.
  • Ergonomic Support: Designed to provide essential support for your arms, back, and baby’s head, helping to reduce strain and making feeding time more comfortable.
  • Hypoallergenic & Eco-Friendly: Naturally hypoallergenic and free from harsh chemicals, Kapok filling is safe for sensitive skin and an excellent choice for eco-conscious parents.
  • Temperature-Regulating: The breathable Kapok filling helps maintain a comfortable temperature for both mom and baby, making it ideal for year-round use.
  • Versatile Design: Not only for feeding—this pillow is also perfect for tummy time, propping your baby up, or supporting them as they learn to sit independently.
  • Easy Care: Includes a removable, machine-washable cover, allowing for hassle-free cleaning and maintaining freshness after daily use.

products.title: Maternity Hygiene Panty | Anti-Fungal | Quick-Drying - Black
products.body_html:
Maternity Panty with Hygiene Patch – Anti-Fungal | Quick-Drying | 100% Cotton Comfort

Description:

Our Maternity Panty with Hygiene Patch is more than just functional—it's a comforting companion on your transformative motherhood journey. From the early months of pregnancy to postpartum recovery, this panty becomes your everyday best friend.

Crafted from soft, breathable 100% cotton, it helps you stay cool and irritation-free while providing full-hip coverage and a secure, gentle fit. With its anti-microbial, anti-fungal, and quick-drying crotch panel, this maternity panty eliminates 99% of infection-causing bacteria, helping to prevent UTIs and maintain intimate hygiene effortlessly.

Thoughtfully designed with a soft yet firm elastic waistband, it adapts beautifully to your changing body, offering gentle belly support and lasting comfort—perfect for both pregnancy and post-delivery.

Because your body deserves care, comfort, and confidence—every single day. 💗

Key Features:

✅ Hygiene Patch Protection: Eliminates 99% of infection-causing bacteria to help prevent UTIs.
✅ Anti-Microbial & Anti-Fungal Crotch: Designed for superior hygiene and all-day freshness.
✅ Quick-Drying Fabric: Wicks away moisture to keep you cool and comfortable.
✅ Soft 100% Cotton Body: Gentle on sensitive skin and breathable for long wear.
✅ Full-Hip Coverage: Provides a secure fit with complete comfort.
✅ Soft & Firm Elastic Waistband: Offers gentle belly support through pregnancy and beyond.
✅ Dual Use: Suitable for both pregnancy and post-delivery wear.

Care Instructions:

🧺 Fabric:

  • Body: 100% Cotton

  • Crotch: 100% Cotton (specially treated hygienic fabric)

Wash Care:

  • Machine or hand wash in cool/warm water

  • Medium tumble dry or sun dry

  • Warm iron if needed

  • Do not bleach or dry clean

Colour - Black

Brand - Myadira

products.title: Mom's Magical Moments
products.body_html:
Pregnancy Coloring Book – Relaxing & Mindful Art Therapy for Moms-to-Be

Unwind and connect with your baby through our Pregnancy Coloring Book! Packed with beautiful illustrations, affirmations, and mindful prompts—perfect for stress relief during pregnancy.

Product Description

Celebrate your journey to motherhood with our Pregnancy Coloring Book!
Designed specially for expecting moms, this book combines calming illustrations, pregnancy affirmations, and positive quotes that help you relax and bond with your baby. Coloring during pregnancy is a gentle way to ease stress, improve focus, and enjoy a peaceful “me-time” moment every day.

Whether you’re in your first trimester or nearing delivery, our Pregnancy Coloring Book offers mindful relaxation, emotional comfort, and joyful anticipation for your baby’s arrival.

✨ Features & Benefits

✅ Relax & De-Stress Naturally – Calming designs help reduce anxiety and promote mindfulness.
✅ Beautiful Pregnancy-Themed Illustrations – Includes images of expectant mothers, floral patterns, and baby-themed art.
✅ Positive Affirmations – Each page inspires self-love, confidence, and emotional well-being.
✅ Perfect Gift for Moms-to-Be – Thoughtful baby shower or maternity gift idea.
✅ High-Quality Paper – Suitable for crayons, color pencils.
✅ Mindful Bonding Time – A creative way to connect with your baby bump.

products.title: Muslin Night Suit Butterfly
products.body_html:
Description

Ensure your child enjoys a comfortable and restful night’s sleep with the Muslin Night Suits. Made from 100% muslin cotton, these night suits are soft, lightweight, and breathable, perfect for keeping your little one cozy and cool throughout the night.

Key Features:

  • 100% Muslin Cotton: Crafted from soft, breathable muslin cotton, gentle on your child’s sensitive skin, providing maximum comfort for a peaceful sleep.
  • Lightweight & Breathable: The open weave of muslin cotton ensures proper airflow, keeping your baby cool in warm weather while still cozy on cooler nights.
  • Comfortable Fit: Designed with a loose and comfortable fit, allowing for easy movement during sleep or playtime.
  • Button-Up Design: Features a simple button-up front for easy dressing and undressing, making bedtime routines quick and hassle-free.
  • Hypoallergenic & Safe: Free from harsh chemicals and dyes, making it safe for your child’s sensitive skin, reducing the risk of irritation or discomfort.
  • Easy to Care For: Machine washable and durable, these night suits maintain their softness and quality, becoming softer with each wash.
  • Size: 0-6M, 6-12M, 1-2 Year
  • Print: Butterfly
  • Brand: Kiids Kingdom

Give your little one the gift of comfort with Muslin Night Suits a perfect blend of softness, breathability, and style, ensuring a restful and relaxing sleep every night.

products.title: Muslin Jablas Knot | Green Leaf
products.body_html:
Every newborn deserves something really soft and gentle. Kiids Kingdom Muslin Jablas are made just for that. Light, breathable and kind to the most sensitive skin. Many moms pick this muslin outfit as their first choice for the early weeks.

products.title: Cutetotz 99% Pure Water Baby Wet wipes
products.body_html:
Description

80 Wipes in a pack

  • Plant-Based Formulation : Complete Plant based unique Innovative formulation (Patent Filed) to suit even for baby’s delicate skin
  • Green Seal™ Certified: Our product complies with rigorous environmental and health standards, ensuring it is safe for people and the planet.
  • Unscented and Gentle: Fragrance-free to ensure safety for sensitive skin.
  • 4x Thicker Plant Fabric: PEFC-certified for superior quality and sustainability.
  • Clinically Proven Safety: Tested on over 240 human subjects,
  • Dermatologist-approved, hypoallergenic, and non-irritant: Thoroughly tested on a diverse group to confirm it does not cause edema, erythema, papules, Blister, vesicle formation, or any other side effects, ensuring complete safety for babies’ sensitive skin and we registered our study in CTRI portal (Clinical Trial Registry of India).
  • High Moisturizing & pH Balanced: pH 5.5 to match infant skin.
  • Vegan and Cruelty-Free Certified: Crafted without animal-derived ingredients and never tested on animals, ensuring ethical care for your baby and the planet
  • Excluded commonly available ingredients such as Phenoxyethanol, Propylene Glycol, Butylene Glycol, Ethylene Glycol, Polysorbate, PEG Derivatives, Methyl Isothiazolinone (MI), Coumarin & formaldehyde derivatives. In CutetotZ® Baby wet wipes, we removed all the above-mentioned ingredients and completely used plant derivatives and received Global health certification Green Seal™.The product is completely free from of Carcinogens, Alcohols, Phthalates, Triclosan, Petrochemicals, Parabens and Sulfates

products.title: Muslin Crinkled Wash Cloth – Random designs
products.body_html:
Kiids Kingdom Muslin Wipes for Baby are a great pick for gentle everyday clean ups. Soft, crinkled and really easy on delicate newborn skin. This muslin crinkled wash cloth feels different from regular flat wipes. Honestly, the crinkled texture does a better job of cleaning without any scrubbing needed.

Our muslin wipes for baby work really well for face, hands and body clean ups. They soak up water nicely and feel smooth against baby's skin. Furthermore, the crinkled texture helps lift dirt and milk residue without any effort. Plus, the random designs make the whole set look really cute and fun.

Key Features of Our Muslin Wipes for Baby:

Crinkled Muslin Fabric: Our muslin wipes for baby use soft crinkled muslin cotton throughout. In particular, the crinkled texture cleans more effectively than a flat cloth. As a result, baby skin stays clean, fresh and comfortable after every wipe.

The Softest Baby Nest Your Little One Will Love: 💤

Lightweight Fiber Filling: This baby nest uses soft lightweight fiber filling throughout the inside. In particular, the fiber filling gives a plush cushioned feel that is softer than cotton options. As a result, baby sinks into a really comfortable and safe resting surface from day one.

products.title: New Mom Maternity Sanitary Pad
products.body_html:
Description

NewMom Maternity Pads – Maxi & Medi Sizes (with Optional Disposable Fixator Brief)

Product Overview

NewMom Maternity Pads are specially designed for postpartum comfort and hygiene, offering ultra-high absorbency, a secure fit, and soft materials for maximum comfort during the post-delivery recovery period. Available in Maxi (for the first 3 heavy days) and Medi (for lighter flow after day 4), these pads are essential for new mothers.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Heavy to Moderate Flow Coverage
    Maxi Pads are ideal for the first three days of heavy postpartum bleeding, while Medi Pads offer a lighter alternative for later days .

  • Super Absorbent Polymer (SAP) Core
    Absorbs large amounts of fluid quickly and converts it into a gel—preventing rewetting and keeping you dry and comfortable .

  • Extra Length & Width for Full Coverage
    Designed longer and wider than regular pads to prevent back and side leaks and maximise protection .

  • Elastic Side Gatherings
    Provide a snug fit that prevents fluid leakage from the sides .

  • Soft, Breathable & Non-Irritating
    The ultra-soft top layer is gentle on sensitive postpartum skin and enhances air circulation to help avoid irritation or rashes .

  • Secure Adhesive Backing
    A wide, strong adhesive strip ensures the pad stays in place, reducing discomfort and shifting during movement .

  • Odor Control for Freshness
    Built to neutralize unpleasant odors, keeping you feeling fresh and confident throughout the day.

  • Optional Fixator Brief for Extra Support
    Pair with the NewMom Disposable Pad Fixator Brief—a breathable, soft, stretchable garment that holds the pad securely, even with C-section incisions, while promoting aeration and hygiene .

Specifications at a Glance

Feature Details
Pads Available Maxi (heavy flow, first 3 days), Medi (reduced flow, day 4 onward)
Absorbency Core Super Absorbent Polymer (SAP)—fluid-locking gel
Dimensions Extra-long & wide for full postpartum coverage
Comfort Features Elastic side gathers, soft top layer, breathable fabric
Attachment Secure wide adhesive backing
Odor Management Built-in odor-control properties
Fixator Brief Soft stretch waistband, breathable; holds pad in place securely
Pack Configurations Pads sold in packs of 5

Usage Instructions

  1. Select the Pad Type: Use Maxi for initial heavier bleeding (days 1–3), switching to Medi as flow lightens from day 4 onwards.

  2. Optional: Wear the Disposable Pad Fixator Brief for additional support—especially useful post C-section or to keep the pad secure during activity.

  3. Apply Pad: Remove backing and adhere the pad to underwear or fixator brief, ensuring it lays flat.

  4. Replace as Needed: For hygiene and comfort, change pads regularly—especially during heavy flow.

  5. Dispose Convenience: Both pads and fixator briefs are disposable for hygienic, effortless postpartum care.

Why NewMom Maternity Pads Stand Out

  • Hospital-Trusted: Designed with insights from experts for postpartum recovery—focus on absorbency, safety, and comfort .

  • Superior Absorbency: SAP technology effectively handles heavy flow and prevents rewetting.

  • Fully Supportive: Fixator briefs ensure the pad remains securely in place without adhesives.

  • Comfort-First Design: Soft materials, breathability, and fit accommodate physical healing and movement.

  • Fresh & Discreet: Odor control and thin profile mean confidence and discretion throughout the day.

products.title: Bella Maternity Pads
products.body_html:

Bella Mamma Comfort Maternity Pads – Super & Plus Sizes (with Fixator Brief)

Product Overview

Bella Mamma Comfort Maternity Pads in Super and Plus sizes come paired with a supportive fixator brief for secure, postpartum protection. Designed for new mothers, these pads offer advanced absorbency, an anatomical fit, and comfort—ideal for managing heavy postpartum flow, lochia, or bladder leakage.

Key Features & Benefits

  • 3-in-1 Solution: Tailored for maternity flow, extra-heavy vaginal bleeding, and light bladder leakage—versatile protection in one product.

  • Superior Absorbency: Engineered with an ultra-absorbent core to lock in fluid quickly, keeping you dry and reducing the risk of irritation.

  • Odor-Stop Technology: Includes odor-control features to neutralize unpleasant smells for freshness and discretion.

  • Anatomical, Comfortable Design: Pads are longer and shaped to match postnatal body contours, with extra coverage and gentle materials safe for wound healing.

  • Secure Fixator Brief: A breathable, supportive mesh brief holds the pad firmly in place—no shifting or the need for adhesives.

Specifications

Attribute Details
Brand Bella Mamma Comfort
Sizes Available Super, Plus (also XXXL/XXXL+ in some variants)
Pack Includes 4 Maternity Pads + 1 Fixator Brief per pack
Usage Scenarios Postpartum bleeding, heavy lochia flow, bladder leakage
Core Technologies Ultra absorbent core, odor-stop, anatomical fit
Suitable For Women recovering after vaginal delivery or C-section
Origin European design; some manufactured in India
Extra Features Breathable materials, safe for healing sensitive skin

Usage Instructions

  1. Wear the provided fixing brief. It keeps the pad securely in place.

  2. Attach the maternity pad to the brief at the correct position.

  3. Replace pad as needed for comfort or when soiled; keep using the brief.

Safety & Care

  • External use only.

  • Keep out of children's reach.

  • Individually tested for skin compatibility and safety during the postpartum period.

Why Bella Mamma Comfort Pads Stand Out

  • Reliable Protection for heavy postpartum flow and bladder leakage with peace of mind all day and night.

  • Comfortable and Safe, especially for C-section scars and sensitive postpartum skin.

  • Built-In Odor Control ensures freshness without extra products.Secure Fit always, thanks to anatomical shape and the fixator brief—no adhesives needed.

  • Parent-Approved: Reviews frequently highlight the comfort, dryness, and superior flow management.

products.title: Bella Sensitive Intimate Wash 100ML
products.body_html:
Description

Bella Sensitive Intimate Wash – Gentle pH-Balanced Care (100 ml)

Product Overview

Introducing Bella Sensitive Intimate Wash (100 ml)—a premium European-formulated intimate liquid wash designed for daily feminine hygiene. Crafted specifically for women with sensitive skin, it maintains the natural pH level of the intimate area while soothing and protecting delicate skin.

Key Features & Benefits

  • pH-Balanced Formula with Lactic Acid
    Helps preserve the intimate area’s natural acidic environment, minimizing the risk of irritation and infection.

  • Deep Hydration & Soothing Ingredients
    Enriched with Glycerine for moisture retention, Allantoin to soothe irritation and support skin regeneration, and D-Panthenol (Vitamin B5) for anti-inflammatory and softening benefits.

  • Mild, Skin-Friendly Formula
    Dermatologically and gynecologically tested to be gentle and non-drying. It respects the natural bacterial flora of the intimate area, helping maintain comfort and freshness.

  • Fresh, Delicate Lather & Aroma
    Features a light, refreshing foam with a mild scent that’s not overpowering—perfect for daily use.

Specifications

Feature Details
Brand Bella (European intimate care brand)
Form/Texture Gentle emulsion/liquid with soft foam
Primary Active Ingredients Lactic Acid, Glycerine, Allantoin, D-Panthenol
Skin Type / Use Case Sensitive skin; maintains natural flora and moisturizes
Volume 100 ml 

Usage Instructions

  1. Pour a small amount into your hand.

  2. Gently cleanse the external intimate area, wiping from front to back.

  3. Rinse thoroughly with water.

  4. Safe for daily hygiene; avoid contact with eyes

Safety & Storage Notes

  • For external use only.

  • Keep out of reach of children.

  • In case of irritation, discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional.

Why Bella Sensitive Intimate Wash Stands Out

  • Maintains pH balance—keeps the intimate area healthy and reduces infection risks.

  • Soothes & hydrates—allantoin and D-panthenol calm irritation while glycerine locks in moisture.

  • Gentle & safe—gynecologically tested and designed for everyday comfort.

  • Feels fresh & light—a delicate scent and foamy texture make it pleasant for daily use.

products.title: Tedibar Spoo Shampoo
products.body_html:
Description

Tedibar Spoo Gentle Baby Shampoo – Tear-Free, pH-Balanced Softness (125 ml)

Product Overview

A pediatrician-recommended, ultra-mild baby shampoo from Tedibar, formulated specifically for delicate scalps of newborns, infants, and toddlers. This soap-free, sulfate-free, tear-free shampoo maintains a gentle pH balance (5.5), delivering a soft, clean, and shining scalp without irritation

Key Features & Benefits

  • Tear-Free & Ultra-Gentle – No stinging or eye irritation during bath time.

  • pH 5.5 Balanced – Supports the skin’s natural protective layer.

  • Soap-, SLS-, Paraben- & Phthalate-Free – Safe for daily use on sensitive baby skin.

  • Softens Hair & Calms Scalp – Helps keep fine baby hair smooth and manage cradle cap gently.

  • Hypoallergenic & Dermatologist-Tested – Designed for minimal skin irritation.

  • Light Foam & Easy Rinse-Off – A little goes a long way, and it rinses cleanly.

Specifications

Feature Details
Brand Tedibar (Torrent Pharmaceuticals)
Variants 125 ml bottle
Formula Type Soap-free, sulfate-free, paraben-free, phthalate-and-dye free 
pH Level 5.5 balanced 

Ingredients Highlight

  • Gentle surfactants: Coco-Betaine, Decyl Glucoside, Sodium Laurylglucosides Hydroxypropylsulfonate

  • Conditioning agents: Dimethicone, Betaine

  • Texture enhancers: PEG-120 Methyl Glucose Dioleate, PEG-12

  • Preservatives: Methylchloroisothiazolinone & Methylisothiazolinone (in rinse-off safe concentrations)

  • Others: Aqua, Citric Acid, Polyquaternium-7, Perfume

Usage Instructions

  1. Wet the baby’s hair and scalp gently with lukewarm water.

  2. Take a small amount of Tedibar Spoo Shampoo and lather softly on hands or scalp.

  3. Massage gently and rinse thoroughly.

  4. Pat hair dry with a soft towel.

  5. Use daily or as advised by your pediatrician.

Safety & Storage

  • For external use only.

  • Avoid contact with eyes.

  • If irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a pediatrician.

  • Store in a cool, dry place. Do not freeze. Keep out of reach of children.

Why Parents Love Tedibar Spoo

Loved for being tear-free, hypoallergenic, and practicing skin-friendly cleansing—many parents report smoother bathtimes and healthier hair.

products.title: Tedibar Bathing Bar
products.body_html:
Description

Tedibar Bathing Bar – Gentle, Soap-Free Moisturizing for Delicate Skin

Product Overview

  • Brand: Tedibar (75g)

  • Type: Soap-free moisturizing bathing bar (syndet-based)

  • Ideal For: Babies, newborns, and anyone with sensitive skin

  • pH Level: Balanced to baby-friendly pH 5.5 for gentle, irritation-free cleansing 

Key Features & Benefits

  • 100% Soap-Free Formula: Contains a syndet base—milder surfactants like maltodextrin, sodium coco-sulfate, sodium cocoyl glycinate, and cetearyl alcohol—that cleanse without stripping moisture 

  • Moisturizing & Skin Barrier Support: Helps maintain the skin’s protective mantle, reducing dryness and rashes while keeping skin soft and supple 

  • pH-Balanced: Tailored to baby’s higher natural pH, preventing irritation and preserving skin health 

  • Pediatrician & Dermatologist Approved: Trusted, gentle formula recommended for newborns and beyond—free from soap, alkali, parabens, and toxins.

  • Practical Design: Includes a drain tray to prevent sogginess and extend bar lifespan.

Specifications—At a Glance

Feature Details
Composition Syndet-based, soap-free bar
pH Level 5.5 (baby-friendly)
Key Ingredients Maltodextrin, Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Sodium Cocoyl Glycinate, Glycerin, etc. 
Suitable Age Newborns and up
Use Frequency Daily use, suitable for bathtime

Usage & Care

  1. Wet skin with lukewarm water.

  2. Gently lather the Tedibar bar in your hands or directly over wet skin.

  3. Rinse off thoroughly and pat dry with a soft towel.

  4. Always place the bar on the provided drain tray post-use to keep it dry and long-lasting.

Safety & Storage

  • For external use only—avoid contact with eyes.

  • In case of irritation or allergic reaction, discontinue use and consult a pediatrician.

  • Always store in a cool, dry place away from heat and direct sunlight.

products.title: Neem Teether Fish
products.body_html:
Soothe your baby’s teething discomfort naturally with the Neem Teether. Crafted from 100% natural neem wood, this teether is designed to offer relief to your little one while being safe, durable, and eco-friendly.

Key Features:

  • Natural Neem Wood: Known for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, neem provides a safe and natural way to ease teething pain and protect against germs.
  • Safe & Non-Toxic: Free from harmful chemicals and toxins, making it a safe choice for your baby to chew on during the teething phase.
  • Durable & Long-Lasting: Crafted from sturdy neem wood, this teether is built to withstand the rigors of teething while staying gentle on your baby’s gums.
  • Easy to Grip: The teether’s ergonomic design is perfect for tiny hands, making it easy for babies to hold and explore.
  • Eco-Friendly Choice: Made from sustainably sourced neem wood, providing a natural, eco-conscious alternative to plastic teethers.
  • Brand: Kiids Kingdom

Soothe your baby’s gums with the natural comfort of the Neem Teether—an eco-friendly, safe, and effective solution for teething relief.

products.body_html:

This sheet is light, gentle and kind on newborn skin. Additionally, the top surface dries fast, so your baby stays fresh and relaxed for longer. Furthermore, the smooth fabric makes this newborn dry sheet easy to use during diaper-free time or as a simple bed protector.

The sheet is strong and can be washed many times without losing its soft feel. Therefore, this reusable dry sheet is a long-lasting choice for home or travel. Finally, its simple design makes it easy to fold, pack and use anywhere you go.

Why Parents Choose This Dry Sheet

  • Soft, gentle and breathable fabric for newborn skin

  • 100% waterproof protection

  • Quick-drying and highly absorbent

  • Reusable, washable and long-lasting

  • Ideal for crib, cradle, bed, stroller and travel use

Key Features:

  • Soft & Gentle Fabric: Smooth surface that stays comfortable on newborn and infant skin.

  • Quick-Drying: Absorbs moisture efficiently and dries fast for frequent use.

  • Lightweight Design: Easy to fold, carry and use at home or while travelling.

  • Brand: Kiids Kingdom

  • Color: Blue

Choose the Dry Sheet for reliable, waterproof protection that ensures your baby’s comfort and keeps your home mess-free.

products.title: Muslin Burp Cloths | Teddy
products.body_html:
Every feeding moment deserves something soft and reliable nearby. 🤍 Kiids Kingdom Muslin Burp Cloths are soft, absorbent and really gentle on your baby's sensitive skin. Honestly, they are one of those baby essentials every new parent is glad they stocked up on early.

Our cloths are crafted from premium crinkled muslin cotton that feels really nice against baby skin. 👶 They soak up spills and messes really well without feeling rough or scratchy. Furthermore, they get softer and better with every single wash. Therefore, you will find yourself reaching for them at every single feed.

Kiids Kingdom is one of the best muslin burp cloth brands in India trusted by parents across the country. Our cloths are loved for their softness, absorbency and really easy care.

Moreover, they are completely free from harmful chemicals making them safe for sensitive newborn skin. Therefore, if you are looking for the best muslin burp cloths for newborns in India this is a great place to start.

What Makes Our Cloths Special: 

  • 🌿 100% premium crinkled muslin cotton throughout
  • 💧 Highly absorbent multi layer design
  • 🏠 Large enough for full shoulder coverage
  • ♻️ Machine washable and gets softer with every wash
  • 👶 Hypoallergenic and free from harmful chemicals
  • 🌸 Safe for sensitive and newborn skin
  • 📦 Perfect for feeding and daily use
  • 🛒 One of the most trusted burp cloth brands in India

Why Our Muslin Burp Cloths Stand Out: 

Most regular burp cloths feel stiff and rough after a few washes. In particular, our crinkled cloths stay soft and gentle wash after wash. Moreover, the crinkled texture adds extra absorbency that flat cloths simply cannot match. Therefore, they are a smarter and gentler choice for your baby every single day.

Are Muslin Burp Cloths Worth It?

Are muslin burp cloths better than cotton ones for babies? Absolutely yes. Muslin cotton is softer, more breathable and more absorbent than regular cotton. Furthermore, the open weave allows better airflow keeping baby comfortable during and after feeds. Therefore, they are the preferred choice among parents who want the best for their newborns.

Are muslin burp cloths necessary for babies? Every parent who has been through feeding time knows the answer. 😄 Furthermore, having soft absorbent cloths ready at every feed saves clothes, saves time and keeps baby comfortable. Therefore, good muslin burp cloths are not just necessary they are absolutely essential.

What You Get in Every Cloth: 

Premium Crinkled Cotton: Our muslin burp cloths use premium crinkled muslin cotton throughout. In particular, this fabric feels really soft and gentle on sensitive newborn skin. As a result, no redness, no irritation and no discomfort during or after feeding time.

Soaks Up Every Mess: Each cloth uses a multi layer design for excellent absorbency. Additionally, the crinkled texture soaks up spills and messes really effectively. Therefore, it keeps both you and baby clean and comfortable at every single feed.

Generous Size: Our cloths are large enough to give full coverage on your shoulder. Moreover, the generous size means no more worrying about spills missing the cloth. Therefore, it is a practical and really useful size for everyday feeding use.

Gentle and Chemical Free: Each cloth is completely free from harmful chemicals and dyes. Moreover, the natural muslin cotton is safe for even the most sensitive newborn skin. Therefore, parents with newborns trust these cloths for safe and gentle daily use.

Simple Washing and Care Guide: ♻️

Machine wash your muslin burp cloths without any worry at all. In addition, every wash makes them softer and more absorbent than before. As a result, they stay fresh, clean and gentle for many months of daily feeding use.

Product Details:

  • Fabric: 100% Crinkled Muslin Cotton
  • Brand: Kiids Kingdom

products.title: Muslin Padded Underwear Pack of 2 Random designs
products.body_html:
Description

Our Muslin Padded Underwear is specially designed for toddlers beginning their potty training journey. Crafted from ultra-soft, breathable muslin cotton, each pair features a built-in absorbent layer that can hold 1 to 2 small urinations, depending on your child’s output. It’s just absorbent enough to catch accidents, while still allowing your child to feel wet—encouraging faster learning and independence.

Give your little one the confidence to grow out of diapers and into big-kid underwear—with softness, safety, and support.

Key Benefits:

🩲 Perfect for Potty Training
Lightly padded to hold 1 to 2 small pees, depending on your child’s bladder size—ideal for early potty learning and day use.

🌿 Made with Soft, Natural Muslin
100% organic muslin cotton is gentle on sensitive skin and breathable for all-day comfort.

🧼 Encourages Awareness
Not too thick or diaper-like—helps toddlers recognize the feeling of wetness and learn faster.

♻️ Reusable & Eco-Conscious
Skip the disposables. Our underwear is washable, durable, and kind to the planet.

🧽 Easy to Wash & Quick to Dry
Machine washable and fast-drying for stress-free cleanup between wears.

👶 Great for Daytime Use
Ideal for use at home, daycare, or on short outings where you're working on building potty habits.

Make potty training a breeze with our Padded Potty Training Underwear. Designed specifically for moms transitioning their toddlers from diapers to underwear, this underwear is perfect for diaper-free time and potty training. With three layers of 100% muslin padding, it offers superior absorbency and partial waterproofing, making accidents more manageable without creating a mess.

Note: Image for Reference only. Random Designs will be given

  • No Refunds or Exchanges: Please note that due to the personal hygine no return or exchange available for padded underwears.

Support your toddler’s transition to underwear with the Padded Potty Training Underwear comfortable, absorbent, and designed to make potty training stress-free for both mom and child.

products.title: Muslin Night Suit Bee
products.body_html:
Description

Ensure your child enjoys a comfortable and restful night’s sleep with the Muslin Night Suits. Made from 100% muslin cotton, these night suits are soft, lightweight, and breathable, perfect for keeping your little one cozy and cool throughout the night.

Key Features:

  • 100% Muslin Cotton: Crafted from soft, breathable muslin cotton, gentle on your child’s sensitive skin, providing maximum comfort for a peaceful sleep.
  • Lightweight & Breathable: The open weave of muslin cotton ensures proper airflow, keeping your baby cool in warm weather while still cozy on cooler nights.
  • Comfortable Fit: Designed with a loose and comfortable fit, allowing for easy movement during sleep or playtime.
  • Button-Up Design: Features a simple button-up front for easy dressing and undressing, making bedtime routines quick and hassle-free.
  • Hypoallergenic & Safe: Free from harsh chemicals and dyes, making it safe for your child’s sensitive skin, reducing the risk of irritation or discomfort.
  • Easy to Care For: Machine washable and durable, these night suits maintain their softness and quality, becoming softer with each wash.
  • Size: 0-6M, 6-12M, 1-2 Year
  • Print: Bee
  • Brand: Kiids Kingdom

Give your little one the gift of comfort with Muslin Night Suits a perfect blend of softness, breathability, and style, ensuring a restful and relaxing sleep every night.
